data.title: Microservices
data.description: The site is built using a microservices architecture to allow for independent deployment and scaling of different components.
data.technical_spec: Deployed using Docker containers orchestrated by Kubernetes.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures the website is accessible and functional across different devices and screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CSS Flexbox and Grid with media queries for adaptive layouts.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized API gateway to manage requests, enhance security, and aggregate APIs.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using RESTful principles and GraphQL for efficient data fetching.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Enhances site speed and reliability by distributing content through a CDN.
data.technical_spec: Integrated with Cloudflare for effective cache management and DDoS protection.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Hosted on a cloud platform to ensure availability and performance under varying loads.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging AWS services like EC2, S3, and CloudFront.
